title: Europeans Are Angry at Trump, but Often Forgiving of Americans
summary_full: A generation ago, foreign fury over the Iraq invasion often blurred into anti-Americanism. Now, some Europeans seem ready to distinguish between the president and the American people.
summary_public: A generation ago, foreign fury over the Iraq invasion often blurred into anti-Americanism. Now, some Europeans seem ready to distinguish between the president and the American people.

IQ.evidence: foreign fury over the Iraq invasion
